scripts.dev: concurrently -n vite,electron -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace=frontend" "npm start --workspace=electron"
scripts.dev:lan: concurrently -n vite,electron -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace=frontend -- --host 0.0.0.0" "npm start --workspace=electron"
scripts.dist: npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm run build:win --workspace=electron
